todos.title: Priority 0 runningMap backend-ID hotfix implementation
todos.description: Fix go-bridge runningMap cache closure so production Claude registered as "claude" resolves the claudecode RunningSessionLister instead of hardcoding h.getAgent("claudecode"). Keep list path read-only and do not change catalog/pagination semantics.
todos.notes: Started Priority 0 production backend-ID runningMap hotfix.

verification.summary: Updated go-bridge runningMap cache recompute path to resolve the registered Claude Code agent by agent.Name()=="claudecode" instead of hardcoded registration id "claudecode"; added internal getFirstAgentByName helper.

todos.title: Priority 0 runningMap backend-ID hotfix tests
todos.description: Add/adjust go-bridge tests registering Claude under "claude" and asserting getRunningMap/list runtime state invokes GetRunningSessionIDs through the production-style wiring.
todos.notes: Targeted go-bridge runningMap tests executed; recording proof next.

verification.summary: Targeted runningMap tests passed, including production-style RegisterAgent("claude", agent.Name()=="claudecode") regression.

todos.title: Priority 0 runningMap backend-ID hotfix regression
todos.description: Run targeted go-bridge regression proving the list running-map path is restored without list hot-path transcript parsing regressions.

verification.summary: Broader go-bridge list/running-map regression passed; list enrichment still uses precomputed runningMap and production "claude" registration resolves Claude Code running lister.

todos.title: Live-only Claude process lister implementation
todos.description: Add core.LiveSessionProcess and core.LiveSessionLister; refactor agent/claudecode stub scanning for reuse; implement LiveSessionProcess and IsProcessAlive without reading transcripts or calling isSessionExecuting.
todos.notes: Started core.LiveSessionLister and agent/claudecode live-only process lister implementation.

verification.summary: Added core.LiveSessionProcess/core.LiveSessionLister and implemented Claude live-only process lookup via shared session stub scanner plus IsProcessAlive procAlive seam; GetRunningSessionIDs now reuses stub scan while preserving executing-only semantics.

todos.title: Live-only Claude process lister tests
todos.description: Add agent/claudecode unit tests proving live-but-idle PID returns Live=true while GetRunningSessionIDs remains executing-only; IsProcessAlive uses procAlive seam and no transcript read.
todos.notes: Targeted LiveSessionProcess/GetRunningSessionIDs tests passed; recording proof next.

verification.summary: Claude live-only lister tests passed, covering live-but-idle not running and stub-only live process lookup without transcript dependency.

todos.title: Live-only Claude process lister regression
todos.description: Run targeted agent/claudecode tests for LiveSessionProcess / RunningSessionIDs and record evidence.

verification.summary: Broader agent/claudecode LiveSession/RunningSession regression passed; live-only and executing-only semantics remain separated.

todos.title: Claude file relay external-turn lifecycle implementation
todos.description: Update go-bridge Claude file relay: backendID-aware sessionLiveProcess helper, initial live gate, reader-based classifier, enriched initial scan, two-tier idle lifecycle, cached PID IsProcessAlive tick recheck, dead-PID guard, interrupt-user continues watching, and no fabricated text_delta.
todos.notes: Started Claude file relay lifecycle implementation.

verification.summary: Implemented Claude file relay lifecycle changes: backendID-aware live process lookup, reader-based classifier, live-gated initial scan, warm-start turn_started, interrupt continues watching, live-idle TTL, process-death bound, cached PID IsProcessAlive recheck, and no file-relay text_delta fabrication.

todos.title: Claude file relay lifecycle tests
todos.description: Add go-bridge tests for live idle snapshot, dead PID partial transcript, TTL restart gap, interrupt-user watching, meta-only append, cached PID O(1) recheck, stale registry cleanup, and production "claude" agent wiring.
todos.notes: Running targeted file relay lifecycle test gate.

verification.summary: Targeted go-bridge file relay tests passed, covering dead PID, warm-start turn_started, live-idle watch, interrupt watch, meta-only growth, cached PID recheck, and process death bound.

todos.title: Claude file relay lifecycle regression
todos.description: Run targeted go-bridge file relay regression tests and confirm no use of runningMap as live gate and no per-tick stub scan.
todos.notes: Running full go-bridge regression for file relay lifecycle changes.

verification.summary: Full go-bridge package test passed after Claude file relay lifecycle implementation.

todos.title: Final build hygiene and documentation sync
todos.description: Update CHANGELOG.md under Unreleased for the externally visible MacBridge fix and keep plan/completion docs consistent with implemented behavior.
todos.notes: Updating CHANGELOG and final docs state.

verification.summary: Updated CHANGELOG.md under Unreleased with the Claude external-turn file relay fix, live-only lister, and production runningMap registration hotfix scope.

todos.title: Final targeted test/build verification
todos.description: Run required targeted Go tests and, if go-bridge source changed, perform the project-required Release build/install validation or record real blocker output.
todos.notes: Running final Go tests and Release build/install validation.

verification.summary: Final Go tests passed including full root module `go test ./...`; unsigned Release build succeeded; app was installed to /Applications and launched; embedded runtime is listening on TCP 8777.

todos.title: Final regression and completion report
todos.description: Run exit audit, generate completion report only if all required todos are proven, and record residual risk. No UI/simulator automation unless explicitly authorized.
todos.notes: Running final audit and generating completion report if all proofs are present.

verification.summary: Exit audit passed: every required exec-plan todo has present proof; final runtime validation confirmed installed /Applications app starts embedded runtime on TCP 8777. No UI/simulator automation was run.

closure.basis: 12/12 todos done (12 proven, 8 re-verified). Committed in 16b0e79. Post-completion: owner-reported streaming lag was diagnosed as the external-turn observation limit (not a code bug; Mac clean), and a PID-reuse latent bug found during this work's code review was fixed in b9f4a59 (procIdentityAlive identity-check seam + regression + live verification).
closure.acceptance: All file-relay lifecycle gates met (live-gated initial scan, warm-start turn_started, reader classifier, live-idle TTL, process-death bound, cached PID recheck, interrupt continue-watch, no fabricated text_delta). No wire-protocol change; IsProcessAlive public contract unchanged.
